metadata.purpose: Schema validation, linting rules, CI integration, and quality enforcement for the plan document package

schemaDefinition.description: XSD schema validating structure of all plan XML documents. Ensures required fields, valid cross-references, and consistent formatting.

validationRules.rule: Every risk must have id, category, likelihood, impact, phase attributes.
Every epic must have id, name, priority, phase, workstream attributes.
Every story must have an id matching pattern E{N}-S{N}.
Every gate must have id, criterion, evidence, status attributes.
Every prompt must have all 9 fields: context, role, objective, instructions, dos, donts, evidence, responseFormat and one of: steps or instructions.
Every ADR must have id, status, date, title, context, options (2+), decision, rationale, consequences.
Every benchmark must have id, name, description, and at least one metric.
Traceability chains must reference valid recommendation, pillar, epic, and gate IDs.

lintingRules.rule: All XML documents must be well-formed (parseable by any XML parser).
No orphan references: every epic, story, risk, gate ID referenced must be defined.
Every epic must have a definitionOfDone section.
Every risk must have a mitigation strategy.
Traceability coverage should be 100% (all recommendations traced to gates).
Total story count should match backlog summary.
Gate scorecard must have at least 1 hard gate per phase.
Prompts should reference files that exist in the codebase.

script.name: validate_plans.py
script.description: Validate all plan XML documents against the XSD schema and cross-reference rules.
script.outputs: Validation report: PASS/FAIL per document, error details
script.exitCode: 0 if all valid, 1 if any errors

script.name: lint_plans.py
script.description: Check plan documents for quality issues, orphan references, and completeness.
script.outputs: Lint report with severity levels: errors (block), warnings (advisory), info (FYI)
script.exitCode: 0 if no errors, 1 if errors found

script.name: plan_to_issues.py
script.description: Generate GitHub issues from implementation backlog epics/stories. Creates issues with labels, milestones, and dependency links.
script.outputs: Created issue URLs or dry-run preview

job.name: lint-plans
job.failureAction: Warning in PR comment (errors block, warnings advisory)

job.name: cross-reference-check
job.failureAction: Block merge if orphan references found
